## Hypothesis

TBR_HIGH_VOL ITM-2 has now passed concentration gate in Q2-2026 (78.2% < 80% threshold). This is the first clean quarter. With Q2-2026 passing both WF ratio (1.37) and concentration, the strategy is eligible for promotion from WATCH-ONLY to PROMISING pending Q3-2026 confirmation.

## Mechanism

- **Current status:** WATCH-ONLY (standalone watcher live)
- **Proposed status:** PROMISING (eligible for J review)
- **Gate requirement:** Q3-2026 must also pass concentration (<80%) to maintain PROMISING status
- **Failure condition:** If Q3-2026 concentration ≥80%, revert to WATCH-ONLY

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper realizes ~14%
2. **Sample bias:** N=47 Q2-2026 trades; single quarter validation
3. **Out-of-sample:** Q2-2026 is OOS; prior OOS was Q3-2025 to Q1-2026 (concentration failed)
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS — Q2-2026 trades not yet validated against OPRA
5. **Failure modes:** Q3-2026 concentration could revert to >80%; regime-dependent edge
6. **Concentration:** Q2-2026 = 78.2% (PASS); prior 6 quarters averaged 87%+ (FAIL)
